data.name: Account.AccessDeniedMessage
data.value: You do not have permission to access this resource.

data.name: Account.AlreadyHaveAccountLogin
data.value: Already have an account? Log in

data.name: Account.EmailCannotBeModified
data.value: The email address cannot be modified

data.name: Account.PasswordChangeContactAdmin
data.value: To change your password, contact the administrator

data.name: Activities.AddDaysToBookingsQuestion
data.value: Add these days to existing bookings?

data.name: Activities.CanAddGroupsLater
data.value: You can then add groups, custom questions and manage registrations.

data.name: Activities.ConfirmRemoveDays
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove these days?

data.name: Activities.DaysWillBeGenerated
data.value: The activity days will be generated automatically based on the start and end dates.

data.name: Activities.DeactivateDaysWarning
data.value: Deactivating days may affect existing bookings

data.name: Activities.DeleteWarning
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this activity?

data.name: Activities.HasBookingsWarning
data.value: This activity contains registrations. Deletion is not possible.

data.name: Activities.ManageDaysHelp
data.value: Manage the active days for this activity

data.name: Activities.GroupsAndQuestionsOptional
data.value: Groups and custom questions are optional and can also be added later.

data.name: Activities.GroupsHelp
data.value: Groups let you divide children into sections (e.g. by age). You can add them now or later.

data.name: Activities.QuestionsHelp
data.value: Custom questions will be asked during registration. You can add them now or later.

data.name: ActivityGroups.CannotDeleteHasBookings
data.value: This group cannot be deleted because it contains registrations.

data.name: ActivityGroups.DeleteErrorHasBookings
data.value: Cannot delete this group because it contains registrations.

data.name: ActivityGroups.DeleteWarning
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this group ?

data.name: ActivityGroups.LabelPlaceholder
data.value: E.g.: Group A, The Marmots, etc.

data.name: ActivityManagement.AllChildrenAssigned
data.value: All children are already assigned to a group.

data.name: ActivityManagement.AllBookingsComplete
data.value: All bookings are complete (confirmed, with group and medical sheet).

data.name: ActivityManagement.AllMembersAssigned
data.value: All team members are already assigned to this activity.

data.name: ActivityManagement.NoAssignedMembers
data.value: No team members are assigned to this activity.

data.name: ActivityManagement.NoConfirmedBookings
data.value: No confirmed registrations for this day.

data.name: ActivityQuestions.CannotDeleteHasAnswers
data.value: This question cannot be deleted because it contains answers.

data.name: ActivityQuestions.DeleteErrorHasAnswers
data.value: Cannot delete this question because it contains answers.

data.name: ActivityQuestions.DeleteWarning
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this question ?

data.name: ActivityQuestions.OptionsRequired
data.value: Options are required for Radio and Dropdown question types

data.name: ActivityQuestions.QuestionTextHelp
data.value: The question asked to parents during registration

data.name: ActivityQuestions.QuestionTextPlaceholder
data.value: E.g.: Does your child have food allergies ?

data.name: ActivityQuestions.Import.SelectActivity
data.value: Select an activity to import its questions.

data.name: ActivityQuestions.Import.NoQuestionsSelected
data.value: Please select at least one question to import.

data.name: ActivityQuestions.Import.NoActivitiesWithQuestions
data.value: No other activity with questions found.

data.name: ActivityQuestions.Import.NoActiveQuestions
data.value: This activity has no active questions.

data.name: Bookings.ConfirmedHelp
data.value: Check if the registration is confirmed

data.name: Bookings.ContactParentForMedicalSheet
data.value: Contact the parent to request the medical sheet.

data.name: Bookings.DeleteBookingWarning
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this registration ?

data.name: Bookings.DeleteRelatedWarning
data.value: This registration has {0} related element(s) that will also be deleted.

data.name: Bookings.DeleteWarning
data.value: Warning ! Are you sure you want to delete this registration ?

data.name: Bookings.MedicalSheetHelp
data.value: Check if the medical sheet has been received

data.name: Bookings.MedicalSheetNotReceived
data.value: The medical sheet has not been received.

data.name: Bookings.NoBookingsFound
data.value: No registrations found for your search.

data.name: Bookings.NoBookingsYet
data.value: No registrations recorded yet. Click "New Registration" to start.

data.name: Bookings.NotYetConfirmed
data.value: This registration is not yet confirmed.

data.name: Bookings.SelectDaysHelp
data.value: Select the days the child will be present

data.name: Children.DeleteConfirmation
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this child?

data.name: Children.NoChildrenFound
data.value: No children found for your search.

data.name: Children.NoChildrenYet
data.value: No children registered yet. Click "Add child" to get started.

data.name: Children.SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search by name, first name or national register number...

data.name: Confirm.DeleteExpense
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this expense?

data.name: Email.AllParentsDesc
data.value: Send to all parents of children registered to this activity

data.name: Email.AttachmentFormats
data.value: Accepted formats: PDF, DOC, DOCX, JPG, PNG (max 10 MB)

data.name: Email.GroupDesc
data.value: Send only to parents of children in a specific group

data.name: Email.MedicalSheetDesc
data.value: Send only to parents whose child has not yet provided their medical form

data.name: Email.MessageNote
data.value: The message will be sent in HTML. Line breaks will be preserved.

data.name: Email.NoEmailsSent
data.value: No emails have been sent yet for this activity.

data.name: Email.RecipientOptionsHelp
data.value: Select the type of recipients for your email

data.name: Email.GroupRecipientsDesc
data.value: Send to parents of children in a specific group

data.name: Email.ExcursionRecipientsDesc
data.value: Send to parents of children registered for an excursion

data.name: Email.Tip1
data.value: Write a clear and explicit subject

data.name: Email.Tip3
data.value: Large attachments may increase send time

data.name: Email.Tip4
data.value: All sends are recorded in history

data.name: Email.MergeFieldsHelp
data.value: Click a variable to insert it into the message. Variables will be replaced with the actual data when sending.

data.name: Email.SendSeparateEmailPerChild
data.value: Send a separate email per child

data.name: Email.PerChildInfo
data.value: The variables (%prenom_enfant%, etc.) will be replaced with each child's data

data.name: Email.PerParentInfo
data.value: One email sent per parent, child variables will not be replaced

data.name: Email.SelectTemplateFirst
data.value: Please select a template before loading

data.name: Error.ActivityNotSelected
data.value: No activity selected. Please access this page from the activity management.

data.name: Expense.NoExpenses
data.value: No expense recorded for this activity

data.name: Field.BankAccountNameHelp
data.value: Name of the bank account holder

data.name: Field.BankAccountNumberHelp
data.value: IBAN of the bank account for payments

data.name: Financial.SalaryCalculationInfo
data.value: The amount to pay is calculated as follows: Prestations (Days × Daily compensation) + Reimbursements − Personal consumptions.

data.name: Message.ActivityHasBookings
data.value: This activity cannot be deleted because it contains registrations.

data.name: Message.BookingConfirmedEmailFailed
data.value: Failed to send the confirmation email

data.name: Message.BookingConfirmedEmailSent
data.value: The registration was confirmed and an email was sent to the parent.

data.name: Message.ParentHasChildren
data.value: This parent cannot be deleted because they have registered children.

data.name: Message.TeamMemberCreated
data.value: The team member was created successfully.

data.name: Message.TeamMemberDeleted
data.value: The team member was deleted successfully.

data.name: Message.TeamMemberUpdated
data.value: The team member was updated successfully.

data.name: Organisations.DeleteCascadeWarning
data.value: Deleting will cascade-delete all related data!

data.name: Organisations.DeleteConfirmation
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this organisation?

data.name: Organisations.ConfirmDeleteLogo
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this logo?

data.name: Organisations.NoOrganisationsFound
data.value: No organisations found for your search.

data.name: Organisations.NoOrganisationsYet
data.value: No organisations registered yet. Click "Add organisation" to get started.

data.name: Parents.DeleteConfirmation
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this parent?

data.name: Parents.NoParentsYet
data.value: No parents registered yet. Click "Add parent" to get started.

data.name: Parents.PostalCodeCityHelp
data.value: Enter the postal code or city

data.name: Parents.SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search by name, email or phone...

data.name: Payments.SelectBookingHelp
data.value: Choose the booking to record the payment for

data.name: Presence.GeneratedBy
data.value: Document automatically generated by Cedeva - Attendance list of

data.name: Presence.NoActiveActivity
data.value: No active activity found. Please create an activity first.

data.name: Presence.NoActiveDay
data.value: No active day found for this activity.

data.name: Presence.NoBookings
data.value: No registrations found for this day.

data.name: Presence.SelectActivityInfo
data.value: Select an activity to manage daily attendance of children.

data.name: Presence.SelectDayInfo
data.value: Select a day to manage children's attendance.

data.name: PublicRegistration.ActivityQuestionsLead
data.value: Please answer the following questions about the activity.

data.name: PublicRegistration.ButtonColorHelp
data.value: Choose the color of form buttons

data.name: PublicRegistration.BookingSuccessMessage
data.value: We have received your registration request. A confirmation email has been sent to

data.name: PublicRegistration.EmbedInstructions
data.value: Copy and paste this HTML code on your website to embed the registration form:

data.name: PublicRegistration.Instruction2
data.value: Paste it into your web page's source code where you want the form to appear

data.name: PublicRegistration.Instruction3
data.value: The form will automatically display with your available activities

data.name: PublicRegistration.Instruction4
data.value: Registrations will be automatically saved in your Cedeva dashboard

data.name: PublicRegistration.KeepNumber
data.value: Keep this number for any correspondence

data.name: PublicRegistration.MedicalSocialInfoHelp
data.value: This information helps us better care for your child.

data.name: PublicRegistration.NextStep1
data.value: You will receive a confirmation email at the address

data.name: PublicRegistration.NextStep2
data.value: Our team will review your registration in the coming days

data.name: PublicRegistration.NextStep3
data.value: You will receive a final confirmation email once your registration is validated

data.name: PublicRegistration.NextStep4
data.value: Don't forget to send us your child's medical form

data.name: PublicRegistration.NoActivitiesAvailable
data.value: No activity available at the moment.

data.name: PublicRegistration.NoQuestionsRequired
data.value: No questions are required for this activity.

data.name: PublicRegistration.QuestionsLead
data.value: Please answer the following questions about the activity.

data.name: PublicRegistration.SelectActivityLead
data.value: Please select the activity you want to register your child for.

data.name: PublicRegistration.ShareLinkText
data.value: You can also share the following link directly:

data.name: TeamMembers.DeleteConfirmation
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this team member?

data.name: TeamMembers.LicenseUrlHelp
data.value: URL of the scanned license document

data.name: TeamMembers.NoMembersFound
data.value: No members found for your search.

data.value: No members registered yet. Click "Add member" to get started.

data.name: TeamMembers.SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search by name, first name or email...

data.name: Users.DeleteConfirmation
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this user?

data.name: Users.EmailConfirmedHelpText
data.value: The user has confirmed their email address

data.name: Users.LeavePasswordFieldsEmptyToKeep
data.value: Leave the password fields empty to keep the current one

data.name: Users.NoUsersFound
data.value: No users found for your search.

data.name: Users.NoUsersYet
data.value: No users registered yet. Click "Add user" to get started.

data.name: Validation.AmountRange
data.value: The amount must be greater than 0

data.name: Validation.EndDateAfterStartDate
data.value: The end date must be after the start date

data.name: Validation.FileExtensionNotAllowed
data.value: File extension not allowed. Allowed extensions: {0}

data.name: Validation.FileSizeExceeded
data.value: File size exceeds the limit of {0} MB

data.name: Validation.InvalidLandlineNumber
data.value: The Belgian landline phone number format is invalid. E.g.: 02 12 34 56 or 010 20 30 40

data.name: Validation.InvalidMobileNumber
data.value: The Belgian mobile phone number format is invalid. E.g.: 0478 12 34 56

data.name: Validation.PasswordLength
data.value: The password must contain at least {1} characters

data.name: Validation.Range
data.value: The value must be between {1} and {2}

data.name: Validation.StringLength
data.value: The {0} field must contain between {2} and {1} characters

data.name: Message.ExcursionDateInvalid
data.value: The date must be within the activity period

data.name: Message.CannotDeleteExcursionWithRegistrations
data.value: Cannot delete an excursion with registrations

data.name: Message.ChildNotEligible
data.value: The child is not in a targeted group

data.name: Excursion.NoExcursions
data.value: No excursion created for this activity

data.name: Excursion.SelectTargetGroupsHelp
data.value: Select the groups of children allowed to register for this excursion

data.name: Excursion.NoActiveGroups
data.value: No active group available for this activity

data.name: Excursion.NoEligibleChildren
data.value: No eligible child for this excursion

data.name: Excursion.RegistrationsHelp
data.value: Tick the boxes to register children for the excursion. The cost will be added to the booking total.

data.name: Excursion.AttendanceHelp
data.value: Tick the boxes to mark children present on the excursion

data.name: Excursion.RecipientHelp
data.value: Choose who receives the email (all registered or a specific group)

data.name: Excursion.MergeVariablesHelp
data.value: Variables available to personalise the message:

data.name: Excursion.NoExpensesYet
data.value: No expense recorded for this excursion

data.name: Excursion.DeleteWarning
data.value: This action is irreversible. The excursion will be deactivated.

data.name: Excursion.CannotDeleteRegistrations
data.value: Cannot delete this excursion: children are registered

data.name: Expense.LabelPlaceholder
data.value: E.g. Bus rental, Walibi tickets, Sandwiches...

data.name: Validation.AtLeastOneGroupRequired
data.value: Please select at least one group

data.name: Validation.ExcursionDateMustBeActiveDay
data.value: The excursion date must match an active day of the activity

data.name: Excursion.TeamManagementHelp
data.value: Check the boxes to assign members to this excursion

data.name: Excursion.NoTeamMembers
data.value: No members assigned to this activity

data.name: The field {0} must have between {2} and {1} characters.
data.value: The field {0} must have between {2} and {1} characters.

data.name: The field {0} must have at least {1} characters.
data.value: The field {0} must have at least {1} characters.

data.name: The field {0} must have at most {1} characters.
data.value: The field {0} must have at most {1} characters.

data.name: The field {0} must be between {1} and {2}.
data.value: The field {0} must be between {1} and {2}.

data.name: The field {0} must be a valid e-mail address.
data.value: The field {0} must be a valid e-mail address.

data.name: The {0} and {1} passwords do not match.
data.value: The {0} and {1} passwords do not match.

data.name: The field {0} must be a valid phone number.
data.value: The field {0} must be a valid phone number.

data.name: The field {0} must be a valid URL.
data.value: The field {0} must be a valid URL.

data.name: The field {0} did not match the pattern '{1}'.
data.value: The field {0} did not match the pattern '{1}'.

data.name: The value '{0}' is not valid for {1}.
data.value: The value '{0}' is not valid for {1}.

data.name: A value for '{0}' property is required.
data.value: A value for '{0}' property is required.

data.name: EmailTemplate.HtmlHelp
data.value: You can use HTML and click the variables on the right to insert them.

data.name: Activities.IncludedPostalCodesHelp
data.value: List of allowed postal codes (comma-separated). If empty, all codes are allowed except the excluded ones.

data.name: Registration.PostalCodeNotAllowed
data.value: Sorry, registrations for this activity are not open to residents of your postal code.

data.name: Registration.PostalCodeExcluded
data.value: Sorry, your postal code is not allowed for this activity.

data.name: Validation.LogoFileHelp
data.value: Accepted formats: JPG, PNG, GIF, SVG. Max size: 5 MB.

data.name: Validation.LicenseFileHelp
data.value: Accepted formats: JPG, PNG, GIF, PDF. Max size: 10 MB.

data.name: TeamMembers.ConfirmDeleteLicense
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this license?

data.name: ActivityQuestions.DragDisabledMultipleActivities
data.value: Drag & drop is disabled when multiple activities are displayed. Filter by activity to reorder.

data.name: PublicRegistration.SecurePayment
data.value: Secure payment by card or Bancontact.

data.name: EmailTemplate.DeleteConfirmMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the template "{0}"?

data.name: EmailTemplate.IsDefaultHelp
data.value: If checked, this template will be used by default for this email type

data.name: EmailTemplate.IsSharedHelp
data.value: If checked, this template will be visible to all coordinators of the organisation

data.name: EmailTemplate.SubjectHelp
data.value: You can use variables like %prenom_enfant% in the subject

data.name: Identity.InvalidUserName
data.value: Username '{0}' is invalid, can only contain letters or digits.

data.name: Identity.PasswordTooShort
data.value: Passwords must be at least {0} characters.

data.name: Identity.PasswordRequiresNonAlphanumeric
data.value: Passwords must have at least one non alphanumeric character.

data.name: Identity.PasswordRequiresDigit
data.value: Passwords must have at least one digit ('0'-'9').

data.name: Identity.PasswordRequiresLower
data.value: Passwords must have at least one lowercase ('a'-'z').

data.name: Identity.PasswordRequiresUpper
data.value: Passwords must have at least one uppercase ('A'-'Z').

data.name: Identity.PasswordRequiresUniqueChars
data.value: Passwords must use at least {0} different characters.

data.name: Identity.UserAlreadyHasPassword
data.value: User already has a password set.

data.name: Organisation.EmailHelp
data.value: Email address that will receive new-registration notifications (otherwise the coordinators).
